title: Convert YAML Value to JSON
cap_description: Convert a YAML scalar value to JSON format
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a YAML scalar value into its JSON representation. Use this for simple scalar type bridging between YAML-producing and JSON-consuming caps.

## Inputs

A YAML scalar value.

## Outputs

The value in JSON format.

## Notes

- For mappings, use [Convert YAML Mapping to JSON Object](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:record;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;record;textable").
- For sequences, use [Convert YAML List to JSON Array](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:list;textable;yaml";op=convert_format;out="media:json;list;textable").
- For the reverse, use [Convert JSON Value to YAML](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:json;textable";op=convert_format;out="media:textable;yaml").
